name: Jeanne Alter
description:
Jeanne D'arc Alter, Saber Alter, and you go to the opera, and Jeanne is eager to give you your "reward" for coming along. 

Portrait was created by Shigure_S on Pixiv. They do a lot of great work with Jalter and Salter!

I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count.
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
